findings.evidence: Current signature at line 121 has `noncomputable def subgroupOrbitHom (K : Subgroup G) (hHK : H ≤ K) [(H.subgroupOf K).Normal]`; Mathlib provides the exact weaker condition equivalence at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Basic.lean:431` and the derived lemma used here at line 450, `le_normalizer_of_normal_subgroupOf`.
findings.fix: Generalize `subgroupOrbitHom` and `subgroupOrbitHom_apply_mk` to take `(hK : K ≤ Subgroup.normalizer (H : Set G))`; keep the stronger quotient hypotheses only in `subgroupQuotientOrbitHom`, passing `Subgroup.le_normalizer_of_normal_subgroupOf hHK` to the generalized action.
findings.issue: `subgroupOrbitHom` assumes `hHK : H ≤ K` and `[(H.subgroupOf K).Normal]`, but for an action of `K` on `X / H` it only needs `K ≤ Subgroup.normalizer (H : Set G)`.

summary: The quotient action is at the right generality, but the intermediate restricted action API assumes normality and containment where normalization alone is the natural hypothesis.
